contexts.context: MK: Do we introduce a concept of <mark>media</mark> type?
Some discussions of various aspects of <mark>media</mark> types and filesystem metadata.
…This is a complex problem; some type of <mark>media</mark> type mapping would be okay.
…parser question. Do we define a mapping from <mark>media</mark> type to parser?
…could make it a mapping from file extension to <mark>media</mark> type and then from media type to parsing function…
…from file extension to media type and then from <mark>media</mark> type to parsing function.
…the bytes; it looks at external encodings and <mark>media</mark> types.
